description: The framing phase is complete. The PM needs to release the framing crew from the project so they can be assigned elsewhere.

nodes.task_description: Verify that all tasks assigned to the 'Framing Crew' are 100% complete.

expected_outcome.value: Agent confirms all framing tasks are complete.

nodes.task_description: Update the resource plan to show the 'Framing Crew' as available for other projects starting tomorrow.

expected_outcome.value: The crew is released from the project.
